debug_info.goal:
case h.w.h.h.h.h
C : Type u
inst✝² : Category.{v, u} C
J : GrothendieckTopology C
inst✝¹ : @CategoryTheory.GrothendieckTopology.IsCohesiveSite C inst✝² J
inst✝ : HasWeakSheafify J (Type (max u v))
X : Type (max u v)
Y : Cᵒᵖ
x : ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X).obj Y
y : unop (((coyoneda.obj (op (⊤_ C))).comp uliftFunctor.{max u v, v}).op.obj Y)
⊢ @ULift.down (Γ.obj ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X))
      (((π₀DiscΓCodiscQuadruple (Sheaf J (Type (max u v))) (Type (max u v))).adj₃.unit.app
              ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X)).val.app
        Y ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app Y x) y) =
    @NatTrans.app (Type (max u v)) types (Type (max u v)) types (Functor.id (Type (max u v)))
      ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).comp Γ)
      (π₀DiscΓCodiscQuadruple (Sheaf J (Type (max u v))) (Type (max u v))).adj₂.unit X x

proof:
change (((IsLocalSite.ΓCoconstantSheafAdj J).unit.app
      ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X)).val.app Y
      ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app Y x) y).down =
    (constantSheafΓAdj J _).unit.app X x
  simp only [IsLocalSite.ΓCoconstantSheafAdj]
  simp only [Adjunction.ofNatIsoLeft, Adjunction.mkOfHomEquiv, Adjunction.mk',
    Adjunction.equivHomsetLeftOfNatIso, Equiv.trans]
  dsimp [IsLocalSite.coconstantSheaf, Presheaf.coconst]
  show (ΓNatIsoSheafSections J (Type (max u v)) terminalIsTerminal).inv.app
    ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X)
    (((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X).val.map (op y.down)
      ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app Y x)) =
    (constantSheafΓAdj J _).unit.app X x
  conv_lhs => rw [show ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X).val.map (op y.down)
    ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app Y x) =
    (toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app (op (⊤_ C)) x from by
      have nat := congr_fun
        ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).naturality (op y.down)) x
      simp [types_comp_apply] at nat
      exact nat.symm]
  simp only [ΓNatIsoSheafSections, constantSheafΓAdj]
  set adj1 := Adjunction.ofIsLeftAdjoint (constantSheaf J (Type (max u v)))
  set adj2 := constantSheafAdj J (Type (max u v)) terminalIsTerminal
  have adj2_unit : adj2.unit.app X x =
      (toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app (op (⊤_ C)) x := by
    show (constantSheafAdj J (Type (max u v)) terminalIsTerminal).unit.app X x = _
    simp [constantSheafAdj, Adjunction.comp_unit_app, constantPresheafAdj]
  rw [← adj2_unit]
  have key := Adjunction.unit_rightAdjointUniq_hom_app adj1 adj2 X
  have := congr_fun key x
  rw [← this, types_comp_apply]
  exact congr_fun ((adj1.rightAdjointUniq adj2).hom_inv_id_app _) _
successful_attempts:
change (((IsLocalSite.ΓCoconstantSheafAdj J).unit.app
      ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X)).val.app Y
      ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app Y x) y).down =
    (constantSheafΓAdj J _).unit.app X x
  simp only [IsLocalSite.ΓCoconstantSheafAdj]
  simp only [Adjunction.ofNatIsoLeft, Adjunction.mkOfHomEquiv, Adjunction.mk',
    Adjunction.equivHomsetLeftOfNatIso, Equiv.trans]
  dsimp [IsLocalSite.coconstantSheaf, Presheaf.coconst]
  show (ΓNatIsoSheafSections J (Type (max u v)) terminalIsTerminal).inv.app
    ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X)
    (((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X).val.map (op y.down)
      ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app Y x)) =
    (constantSheafΓAdj J _).unit.app X x
  conv_lhs => rw [show ((constantSheaf J (Type (max u v))).obj X).val.map (op y.down)
    ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app Y x) =
    (toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app (op (⊤_ C)) x from by
      have nat := congr_fun
        ((toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).naturality (op y.down)) x
      simp [types_comp_apply] at nat
      exact nat.symm]
  simp only [ΓNatIsoSheafSections, constantSheafΓAdj]
  set adj1 := Adjunction.ofIsLeftAdjoint (constantSheaf J (Type (max u v)))
  set adj2 := constantSheafAdj J (Type (max u v)) terminalIsTerminal
  have adj2_unit : adj2.unit.app X x =
      (toSheafify J ((Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).app (op (⊤_ C)) x := by
    show (constantSheafAdj J (Type (max u v)) terminalIsTerminal).unit.app X x = _
    simp [constantSheafAdj, Adjunction.comp_unit_app, constantPresheafAdj]
  rw [← adj2_unit]
  have key := Adjunction.unit_rightAdjointUniq_hom_app adj1 adj2 X
  have := congr_fun key x
  rw [← this, types_comp_apply]
  exact congr_fun ((adj1.rightAdjointUniq adj2).hom_inv_id_app _) _
